content: agent2: implementing hash_sha256 type in outlines/types/__init__.py (adding new type definition). Should be additive only, low collision risk.

agent2: added hash_sha256 = Regex(r'[a-fA-F0-9]{64}') right after isbn in outlines/types/__init__.py, patch already written. If we share the same file, please append your ssn type after my hash_sha256 block to avoid overlapping the same insertion point.
